label: HVAC — Design pass
description: Audit topology → auto-size ducts → balance system → NC check → validate. The standard HVAC engineer's pre-issue sequence. Respects the active scope and sizing-strategy radio set on the HVAC dock panel.

steps.label: Auto-size ducts (strategy + scope from HVAC panel)
Run v4 validators (+ healthcare if applicable)

notes: Each step opens its own transaction; on cancel the partial work commits but later steps are skipped.
The HVAC panel WorkflowGrid records every step + status.
Edit <project>/_BIM_COORD/workflow_overrides.json to swap individual steps for project-specific commands.
